prompt_inputs.goal: Build endurance and stamina for marathon training

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions (breakfast, snack, lunch, snack, dinner) to support high caloric needs and sustained energy
Total daily caloric intake is between 2800-3200 calories, appropriate for a 68kg endurance athlete
Meals emphasize complex carbohydrates (50-60% of calories) and adequate protein (1.6g per kg body weight) for muscle recovery
Portion sizes and meal timing are specified to optimize fuel availability before and after training sessions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a lightweight endurance athlete (runner) with high caloric needs and no dietary restrictions - verifies the prompt calculates appropriate portions and meal frequency for stamina-based sports

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes minimum 130g protein per day (1.5g per kg body weight) sourced from vegetarian options
All meals and snacks are certified gluten-free or naturally gluten-free with no cross-contamination risks
Plan contains exactly 4 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day with caloric intake supporting muscle gain (~2800-3000 kcal)
Meals are practical and compact, requiring minimal preparation time while supporting heavy strength training recovery
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a heavy strength athlete (weightlifter) with multiple dietary restrictions (vegetarian + gluten-free) - evaluates the prompt's ability to balance protein requirements with constraint limitations while maintaining meal plan quality

prompt_inputs.goal: cutting phase for weight loss while maintaining athletic performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan provides caloric intake in the range of 2000-2300 calories (approximately 10-15% below estimated maintenance for given metrics)
Protein content is at least 1.6g per kg of body weight (≥109g) to preserve muscle mass during cutting phase
All meals are compact and listed in a single day format with clear timing and portion sizes
Macronutrient distribution supports athletic performance with balanced carbohydrates and healthy fats alongside adequate protein
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete in a cutting phase for weight loss with specific height/weight metrics showing low BMI - assesses whether the prompt appropriately adjusts caloric intake downward while maintaining athletic performance nutrition
